LamBox.Empty:
  mutual inductive(s):
    Empty
      constructors:

Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat:
  mutual inductive(s):
    Nat
      constructors:
        zero (0 arg(s))
        suc (1 arg(s))

Agda.Builtin.Bool.Bool:
  mutual inductive(s):
    Bool
      constructors:
        r#false (0 arg(s))
        r#true (0 arg(s))

scheme.not:
  constant declaration:
    body: λ _ →
            case<Agda.Builtin.Bool.Bool{0},0> @0 of
              λ<[]> Agda.Builtin.Bool.Bool{0}{1}
              λ<[]> Agda.Builtin.Bool.Bool{0}{0}

scheme.f:
  constant declaration:
    body: λ _ _ →
            case<Agda.Builtin.Bool.Bool{0},0> @1 of
              λ<[]> scheme.not @0
              λ<[]> Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1} @0

scheme.test:
  constant declaration:
    body: scheme.f Agda.Builtin.Bool.Bool{0}{1}
            (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
               (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                  (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                     (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                        (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1} Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{0})))))
main program: [scheme.test]
